configure_addon.title: Configure the UsenetStreamer add-on
configure_addon.description: Set the admin shared secret that protects the UsenetStreamer admin API. Keep it safe — you can reuse it to open the add-on's admin dashboard. The integration preserves any other options (stream token, base URL) you have set in the Supervisor UI.

progress.install_addon: Installing the UsenetStreamer add-on. This may take a few minutes.

abort.not_hassio: The UsenetStreamer integration requires Home Assistant OS or a Supervised installation so it can install and manage the add-on.
abort.addon_info_failed: Failed to get information about the UsenetStreamer add-on.
abort.addon_install_failed: Failed to install the UsenetStreamer add-on.
abort.addon_start_failed: Failed to start the UsenetStreamer add-on.
abort.addon_not_found: The UsenetStreamer add-on was not found in the Supervisor store. Install it (via the Add-on Store, the Samba share, or a Git repository) and try again.
abort.addon_validation_failed: The add-on is installed but the integration could not reach the admin API. Check the Supervisor add-on log for the UsenetStreamer add-on — the most common cause is an empty admin shared secret or the add-on not yet listening on port 7000.
abort.invalid_auth: The UsenetStreamer add-on rejected the configured shared secret. Re-run the add-on configuration and make sure the values match.

error.addon_options_write_failed: Could not save the add-on options. Check the Supervisor log and try again.
